lineage.Process: SpatialJoin %SA COSCAT_mean H:\temp\temp10.shp JOIN_ONE_TO_MANY KEEP_COMMON "FID_1 "FID_1" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,FID_1,-1,-1;MAIN_BAS "MAIN_BAS" true true false 19 Double 6 18 ,First,#,%SA,MAIN_BAS,-1,-1;area_km2 "area_km2" true true false 19 Double 9 18 ,First,#,%SA,area_km2,-1,-1;hBASIN_cod "hBASIN_cod" true true false 19 Double 6 18 ,First,#,%SA,hBASIN_cod,-1,-1;basinA_km2 "basinA_km2" true true false 19 Double 9 18 ,First,#,%SA,basinA_km2,-1,-1;nObs "nObs" true true false 19 Double 9 18 ,First,#,%SA,nObs,-1,-1;nChan_mean "nChan_mean" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,nChan_mean,-1,-1;Amax "Amax" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,Amax,-1,-1;obSA_km2 "obSA_km2" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,obSA_km2,-1,-1;obSA_gt90m "obSA_gt90m" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,obSA_gt90m,-1,-1;gSA_km2 "gSA_km2" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,gSA_km2,-1,-1;gSA_sd_km2 "gSA_sd_km2" true true false 19 Double 12 18 ,First,#,%SA,gSA_sd_km2,-1,-1;gSA_pcnt "gSA_pcnt" true true false 19 Double 14 18 ,First,#,%SA,gSA_pcnt,-1,-1;gSA_sd_pcn "gSA_sd_pcn" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,gSA_sd_pcn,-1,-1;gXmin "gXmin" true true false 19 Double 12 18 ,First,#,%SA,gXmin,-1,-1;gAlpha "gAlpha" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,gAlpha,-1,-1;gAlpha_sd "gAlpha_sd" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,gAlpha_sd,-1,-1;pSA_km2 "pSA_km2" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,pSA_km2,-1,-1;pSA_sd_km2 "pSA_sd_km2" true true false 19 Double 7 18 ,First,#,%SA,pSA_sd_km2,-1,-1;pSA_pcnt "pSA_pcnt" true true false 19 Double 14 18 ,First,#,%SA,pSA_pcnt,-1,-1;pSA_sd_pcn "pSA_sd_pcn" true true false 19 Double 10 18 ,First,#,%SA,pSA_sd_pcn,-1,-1;pXmin "pXmin" true true false 19 Double 12 18 ,First,#,%SA,pXmin,-1,-1;pAlpha "pAlpha" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,pAlpha,-1,-1;pAlpha_sd "pAlpha_sd" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,pAlpha_sd,-1,-1;pX2_stat "pX2_stat" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,pX2_stat,-1,-1;pX2_p "pX2_p" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,pX2_p,-1,-1;pKS_D "pKS_D" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,pKS_D,-1,-1;pKS_p "pKS_p" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,pKS_p,-1,-1;SA_km2 "SA_km2" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,%SA,SA_km2,-1,-1;SA_sd_km2 "SA_sd_km2" true true false 19 Double 12 18 ,First,#,%SA,SA_sd_km2,-1,-1;SA_pcnt "SA_pcnt" true true false 19 Double 14 18 ,First,#,%SA,SA_pcnt,-1,-1;SA_sd_pcnt "SA_sd_pcnt" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,SA_sd_pcnt,-1,-1;SAestMeth "SAestMeth" true true false 10 Text 0 0 ,First,#,%SA,SAestMeth,-1,-1;fit "fit" true true false 19 Double 14 18 ,First,#,%SA,fit,-1,-1;lwr "lwr" true true false 19 Double 14 18 ,First,#,%SA,lwr,-1,-1;upr "upr" true true false 19 Double 14 18 ,First,#,%SA,upr,-1,-1;climResids "climResids" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,%SA,climResids,-1,-1;ArcIds "ArcIds" true true false 79 Text 0 0 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,ArcIds,-1,-1;AREA "AREA" true true false 19 Double 13 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,AREA,-1,-1;PERIMETER "PERIMETER" true true false 19 Double 13 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,PERIMETER,-1,-1;C_COSCAT_ "C_COSCAT_" true true false 9 Long 0 9 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,C_COSCAT_,-1,-1;C_COSCAT_I "C_COSCAT_I" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,C_COSCAT_I,-1,-1;SBCODE "SBCODE" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,SBCODE,-1,-1;RS_CRITERI "RS_CRITERI" true true false 10 Text 0 0 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,RS_CRITERI,-1,-1;RS_CODE "RS_CODE" true true false 7 Text 0 0 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,RS_CODE,-1,-1;SBCODE_1 "SBCODE_1" true true false 7 Long 0 7 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,SBCODE_1,-1,-1;BasinArea_ "BasinArea_" true true false 19 Double 9 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,BasinArea_,-1,-1;USGS_total "USGS_total" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,USGS_total,-1,-1;USGS_effec "USGS_effec" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,USGS_effec,-1,-1;Raymond_to "Raymond_to" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,Raymond_to,-1,-1;Raymond_ef "Raymond_ef" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,Raymond_ef,-1,-1;mean_total "mean_total" true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,mean_total,-1,-1;USGS_perSA "USGS_perSA" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,USGS_perSA,-1,-1;USGS_ef_pe "USGS_ef_pe" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,USGS_ef_pe,-1,-1;ray_perSA "ray_perSA" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,ray_perSA,-1,-1;ray_ef_per "ray_ef_per" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,ray_ef_per,-1,-1;mean_perSA "mean_perSA" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,mean_perSA,-1,-1;mean_ef_pe "mean_ef_pe" true true false 19 Double 15 18 ,First,#,COSCAT_mean,mean_ef_pe,-1,-1" HAVE_THEIR_CENTER_IN # #
AddField H:\temp\temp10.shp diff FLOAT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

ExportFeatures RSSA_basins "E:\research data\Arctic_rivers\ObRiver\ObRiverBasin.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "BAS_ID "BAS_ID" true true false 19 Double 6 18,First,#,RSSA_basins,BAS_ID,-1,-1;BAS_Class "BAS_Class" true true false 9 Text 0 0,First,#,RSSA_basins,BAS_Class,0,9;BA_km2 "BA_km2" true true false 19 Double 9 18,First,#,RSSA_basins,BA_km2,-1,-1;obRSSA_km2 "obRSSA_km2" true true false 19 Double 11 18,First,#,RSSA_basins,obRSSA_km2,-1,-1;mnRSSA_pc "mnRSSA_pc" true true false 19 Double 14 18,First,#,RSSA_basins,mnRSSA_pc,-1,-1;sdRSSA_pc "sdRSSA_pc" true true false 19 Double 15 18,First,#,RSSA_basins,sdRSSA_pc,-1,-1;rayRSSA_pc "rayRSSA_pc" true true false 19 Double 15 18,First,#,RSSA_basins,rayRSSA_pc,-1,-1;difRSSA_pc "difRSSA_pc" true true false 19 Double 14 18,First,#,RSSA_basins,difRSSA_pc,-1,-1" #

dataIdInfo.idPurp: HydroBASINS data provides a series of polygon layers that depict watershed boundaries and sub-basin delineations at a global scale. The goal of this product is to provide a seamless global coverage of consistently sized and hierarchically nested sub-basins at different scales (from tens to millions of square kilometers), supported by a coding scheme that allows for analysis of watershed topology such as up- and downstream connectivity.

idCitation.resTitle: HydroBASINS Siberia, Level 0, Version 1.c - Sub-basins in standard format (without lakes)

Consts.useLimit: HydroBASINS is covered by the same License Agreement as the HydroSHEDS database, which is available at http://www.hydrosheds.org. For all regulations regarding license grants, copyright, redistribution restrictions, required attributions, disclaimer of warranty, indemnification, liability, waiver of damages, and a precise definition of licensed materials, please refer to the License Agreement. By downloading and using the data the user agrees to the terms and conditions of the License Agreement.

dataIdInfo.idCredit: The HydroBASINS product has been developed on behalf of World Wildlife Fund US (WWF), with support and in collaboration with the EU BioFresh project, Berlin, Germany; the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN), Cambridge, UK; and McGill University, Montreal, Canada. We kindly ask users to cite HydroBASINS in any published material produced using the data. If possible, online links to the HydroSHEDS website (http://www.hydrosheds.org) should be provided. Citations and acknowledgements of the HydroBASINS data should be made as follows: Lehner, B., Grill G. (2013): Global river hydrography and network routing: baseline data and new approaches to study the world’s large river systems. Hydrological Processes, 27(15): 2171–2186. Data is available at www.hydrosheds.org.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: All HydroBASINS layers were derived from World Wildlife Fund’s HydroSHEDS data based on a grid resolution of 15 arc-seconds (approximately 500 m at the equator). Watersheds were delineated in a consistent manner at different scales, and a hierarchical sub-basin breakdown was created following the topological concept of the Pfafstetter coding system. The resulting polygon layers are termed HydroBASINS and represent a subset of the HydroSHEDS database. This shapefile contains (sub-)basin polygons for Siberia at Pfafstetter level 0.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
